baselineHardGates.label: project host pack certified
baselineHardGates.requirement: project host pack / runtime boundary evidence must be certified before page-component stays on the primary chain

baselineHardGates.label: shell ownership stable
baselineHardGates.requirement: shell ownership, carrier owner, and main scroll owner may not drift into the business page

baselineHardGates.label: business edits stay in governed slots
baselineHardGates.requirement: business implementation may only fill governed slots and may not synthesize local shell/header/layout owners

conditionalHardGates.label: header layout proof complete

anyOf: page-level actions owner is PageHeader extra

conditionalHardGates.requirement: headerLayoutContract plus certification / host facts / runtime proof must show PageHeader stretch, right-docked extra, and 60px rhythm owner are unchanged

notes: When header is part of the governed page structure, the conditional header gate is added and the effective gate count becomes 5.
Current shipped ordinary typical page molds usually include header, so maintainers should expect 5 effective hard gates in most legacy page plans.
